metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for Tangle Network development skills

plugins.name: tangle-blueprint-expert
plugins.description: Expert workflow for designing, implementing, testing, and documenting Tangle Blueprints with correct hierarchy, tenancy/auth modeling, and production-like CLI validation

plugins.name: tangle-blueprint-innovate
plugins.description: Idea-to-spec conversation skill for Tangle Blueprints. Research-driven market scan across GitHub/HN/Product Hunt/arxiv/Twitter, customer-archetype lock, multi-operator-by-default design, BSM primitive selection, OSS-wrapping patterns, and in-line boringness test. Produces a 1-page spec ready for handoff to tangle-blueprint-expert

plugins.name: sandbox-blueprint
plugins.description: Build sandbox-style Tangle Blueprints — container/VM provisioning, lifecycle management, operator API, session auth, secret provisioning, sidecar integration, tiered GC, and BSM contracts

plugins.name: sandbox-product
plugins.description: Build products on the Tangle Sandbox SDK — direct-connect streaming, token auth, Cloudflare Workers deployment, and edge-first architecture patterns

plugins.name: blueprint-frontend
plugins.description: Build React frontends for Tangle Blueprints — job submission, operator discovery, service provisioning, session auth, Web3 providers, and @tangle-network/blueprint-ui integration

plugins.name: tangle-branded-designer
plugins.description: Tangle Network brand design system — colors, typography, layout patterns, component aesthetics, and visual language for building on-brand applications

plugins.name: plan-mega-review
plugins.description: Garry Tan's Mega Plan Review Mode — three review modes (Scope Expansion, Hold Scope, Scope Reduction) with 10 review sections and STOP gates

plugins.name: soc2-audit
plugins.description: SOC2 security audit — infrastructure and codebase scanning, Trust Service Criteria mapping, and tiered remediation checklist for compliance readiness
